'''âsh-r-m''' ('''kasharam''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:neigh|neigh]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-r-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:neigh|neigh]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âsh-r-m
|-
! Lemma
| kasharam
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thisharam|thisharam]] || [[word:jisharam|jisharam]] || [[word:shisharam|shisharam]] || [[word:kisharam|kisharam]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthusharam|thuthusharam]] || [[word:jujusharam|jujusharam]] || [[word:shushusharam|shushusharam]] || [[word:kukusharam|kukusharam]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thusharam|thusharam]] || [[word:jusharam|jusharam]] || [[word:shusharam|shusharam]] || [[word:kusharam|kusharam]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thusharam|thusharam]] || [[word:jusharam|jusharam]] || [[word:shusharam|shusharam]] || [[word:kusharam|kusharam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thesharam|thesharam]] || [[word:jesharam|jesharam]] || [[word:shesharam|shesharam]] || [[word:kesharam|kesharam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothosharam|thothosharam]] || [[word:jojosharam|jojosharam]] || [[word:shoshosharam|shoshosharam]] || [[word:kokosharam|kokosharam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thosharam|thosharam]] || [[word:josharam|josharam]] || [[word:shosharam|shosharam]] || [[word:kosharam|kosharam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thosharam|thosharam]] || [[word:josharam|josharam]] || [[word:shosharam|shosharam]] || [[word:kosharam|kosharam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠsharam|thĂŠsharam]] || [[word:jĂŠsharam|jĂŠsharam]] || [[word:shĂŠsharam|shĂŠsharam]] || [[word:kĂŠsharam|kĂŠsharam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathasharam|thathasharam]] || [[word:jajasharam|jajasharam]] || [[word:shashasharam|shashasharam]] || [[word:kakasharam|kakasharam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thasharam|thasharam]] || [[word:jasharam|jasharam]] || [[word:shasharam|shasharam]] || [[word:kasharam|kasharam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thasharam|thasharam]] || [[word:jasharam|jasharam]] || [[word:shasharam|shasharam]] || [[word:kasharam|kasharam]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shasharam|shasharam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshasharam|goshasharam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishasharam|gokishasharam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shasharamnĂŒ|shasharamnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshasharamnknĂŒ|goshasharamnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishasharamnĂŒ|gokishasharamnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shasharamshĂ«|shasharamshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshasharamnkshĂ«|goshasharamnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishasharamshĂ«|gokishasharamshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasharamro|shasharamro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasharamnkro|goshasharamnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasharamro|gokishasharamro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shasharamu|shasharamu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasharamnkmu|goshasharamnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasharamu|gokishasharamu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shasharamsher|shasharamsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshasharamnksher|goshasharamnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishasharamsher|gokishasharamsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shasharamng|shasharamng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshasharamnkng|goshasharamnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishasharamng|gokishasharamng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shasharamya|shasharamya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshasharamnkya|goshasharamnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishasharamya|gokishasharamya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shasharamyam|shasharamyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshasharamnkyam|goshasharamnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishasharamyam|gokishasharamyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasharamnĂŒshĂ«|shasharamnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasharamnknĂŒshĂ«|goshasharamnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasharamnĂŒshĂ«|gokishasharamnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasharamnĂŒro|shasharamnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasharamnknĂŒro|goshasharamnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasharamnĂŒro|gokishasharamnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasharamnĂŒmu|shasharamnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasharamnknĂŒmu|goshasharamnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasharamnĂŒmu|gokishasharamnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasharamshĂ«nĂŒ|shasharamshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasharamnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshasharamnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasharamshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishasharamshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasharamshĂ«ro|shasharamshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasharamnkshĂ«ro|goshasharamnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasharamshĂ«ro|gokishasharamshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasharamshĂ«mu|shasharamshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasharamnkshĂ«mu|goshasharamnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasharamshĂ«mu|gokishasharamshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasharamronĂŒ|shasharamronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasharamnkronĂŒ|goshasharamnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasharamronĂŒ|gokishasharamronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasharamroshĂ«|shasharamroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasharamnkroshĂ«|goshasharamnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasharamroshĂ«|gokishasharamroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasharamromu|shasharamromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasharamnkromu|goshasharamnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasharamromu|gokishasharamromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasharamunĂŒ|shasharamunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasharamnkmunĂŒ|goshasharamnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasharamunĂŒ|gokishasharamunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasharamushĂ«|shasharamushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasharamnkmushĂ«|goshasharamnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasharamushĂ«|gokishasharamushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasharamuro|shasharamuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasharamnkmuro|goshasharamnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasharamuro|gokishasharamuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|806ef69}}
